name: Alien LT Trace to 3D
summary: A browser-based parametric tonearm-wand tool that converts traced reference geometry into a gated 3D model and export workflow.
description: The tool combines manual and SVG-assisted tracing, structured AI parameter exchange, OpenCascade-based parametric geometry, interactive 3D preview, project persistence and validation-gated STL and STEP export for the Engrove Alien LT wand body.
capabilities: Create and edit multiple named 2D traces with stable shape identifiers.
Generate a parametric OpenCascade 3D wand body from validated parameters.
Exchange structured parameter proposals through a manual AI prompt and JSON workflow.
Export STL and STEP only after geometry validation gates pass.
Save and restore trace and 3D workspace state together.

inputs.name: trace_geometry
inputs.description: Manual or SVG-derived top and side reference geometry.

inputs.name: wand_parameters
inputs.description: Validated dimensions and shape parameters in millimetres.

outputs.name: stl_export
outputs.description: A triangulated export produced only after watertight validation.

outputs.name: step_export
outputs.description: An AP242-oriented CAD exchange export produced from validated geometry.

outputs.name: workspace
outputs.description: Combined trace and 3D parameter state for later continuation.

whenToUse: Use when translating documented tonearm-wand reference geometry into a parametric browser CAD model.
Use when iterating traced profiles and explicit dimensions before downstream CAD refinement or prototyping.
whenNotToUse: Do not use as a certified metrology system or as proof of manufacturing compliance.
Do not use to model or serialize the separate LT mechanism fields excluded by the project contract.
limitations: Output accuracy depends on the quality, scale and interpretation of supplied traces and parameters.
The tool does not perform finite-element analysis, laboratory verification or manufacturing certification.
OpenCascade WebAssembly is loaded from a version-pinned external CDN asset because the full binary exceeds the Cloudflare Pages per-file limit.

mayClaim: The tool provides local browser-based tracing, parametric model generation and validation-gated export.
The tool supports structured manual AI parameter exchange without requiring an AI API key.
negativeClaimBoundaries: No public programmatic backend API is provided.
No user account, OAuth flow or commerce system is provided.
The generated geometry is not certified or laboratory-validated.
mustNotClaim: The tool produces certified or laboratory-grade measurements.
The tool provides a public backend API or server MCP endpoint.

faq.question: Does the tool upload project data to an Engrove server?
faq.answer: No. The application processes tool state locally in the browser and does not require an account or OAuth connection.

faq.question: Are STL and STEP files guaranteed to be manufacturing-ready?
faq.answer: No. Exports pass the implemented software validation gates, but users must independently verify dimensions, materials and manufacturing requirements.

faq.question: Does the tool include the separate LT mechanism geometry?
faq.answer: No. The wand application contract explicitly excludes the LT mechanism fields and prevents them from entering its schemas and AI exchange surfaces.
